---
title: "Ellastic Net escenari 50%"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-05-01"
output: html_document
---

# Elastic Net 50%
```{r}
setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_50_corrAleat.RData")
library(glmnet)
library(caret)

resultats_enet <- data.frame(
  N             = integer(),
  pi            = numeric(),
  correlation   = character(),  
  Sensibilitat  = numeric(),
  Especificitat = numeric(),
  VPP           = numeric(),
  VPN           = numeric(),
  Accuracy      = numeric(),
  NetBenefit    = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

vars_seleccionades_enet <- list()

system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {

    N           <- comb$N[i]
    pi          <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- as.character(comb$correlation[i])  

    metrics        <- list()
    vars_selec_bin <- matrix(0, nrow = iters, ncol = num_vars)

    for (j in 1:iters) {
      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j,
          "| N =", N, "| pi =", pi, "| corr =", correlation, "\n")

      X_mat <- as.matrix(X[[i]][[j]])
      y_vec <- Y[[i]][[j]]

      # apliquem validació creuada per trobar el valor òptim de lambda
      tryCatch({
        lambda_estim <- cv.glmnet(X_mat, y_vec,
                                  family = "binomial",
                                  alpha  = 0.5,
                                  nfolds = 5)
      # s'ajusta el model final amb el lambda òptim
        model_enet <- glmnet(X_mat, y_vec,
                             alpha  = 0.5,
                             family = "binomial",
                             lambda = lambda_estim$lambda.min)
# Selecció de variables amb coeficients prou grans (llindar sd(x)/20)
# per evitar retenir efectes pràcticament nuls
        vars_seleccionades <- which(
          coefficients(model_enet)[-1] >= sd(as.vector(X[[i]][[j]])) / 20
        )

        vars_selec_bin[j, vars_seleccionades] <- 1
        metrics[[j]] <- metriques(vars_seleccionades, nv = num_vars)

      }, error = function(e) {
        cat(sprintf("  [WARN] Escenari %d, sim %d: %s\n", i, j, conditionMessage(e)))
        metrics[[j]] <<- metriques(integer(0), nv = num_vars)
      })
    }

    resultats_enet <- rbind(
      resultats_enet,
      data.frame(
        N             = N,
        pi            = pi,
        correlation   = correlation,
        Sensibilitat  = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["sensibilitat"]),  na.rm = TRUE),
        Especificitat = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["especificitat"]), na.rm = TRUE),
        VPP           = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPP"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
        VPN           = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["VPN"]),           na.rm = TRUE),
        Accuracy      = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["accuracy"]),      na.rm = TRUE),
        NetBenefit    = mean(sapply(metrics, function(x) x["net_benefit"]),   na.rm = TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    )

    vars_seleccionades_enet[[i]] <- vars_selec_bin
  }
})

print(resultats_enet)
save(resultats_enet, vars_seleccionades_enet, file = "resultats_enet_50_2.RData")
```
